subject: Are micrographs in average/ aligned and dose-weighted?
body:
Hi,
Can micrographs in the average/ folder be used directly for particle 
picking and extraction in other packages? Are they aligned and 
dose-weighted?
I wanted to double check since the Export Micrograph List feature gives 
_rlnMicrographName with .mrc (matching average/), but the particles star 
file gives _rlnMicrographName with .tif (matching the movie names).

Thanks!
